prompt: Create a cinematic cyberpunk portrait of one edgy female hacker/assassin in a rainy neon city at night, shown from the chest up in a tight three-quarter side profile facing right. She has black messy hair tied in a high bun with loose strands, cybernetic cables trailing from the bun and neck, small glowing green implants near the ear, and dark earrings. Her face is intentionally covered by one large opaque dark gray square censor block centered over the eyes, nose, and mouth. She wears one glossy black tactical leather jacket with layered straps, buckles, shoulder armor, fingerless gloves, dangling chains, and one bright green illuminated device on her upper arm. Her right hand is raised near her covered mouth holding one glossy green bell pepper, as if biting it, making the ordinary object look stylish and cool. The background is a dark futuristic alley filled with green fog, rain haze, reflections, shallow depth of field, and exactly two prominent vertical neon light bars: one bright bar on the far left and one bright bar on the right behind her. Use a moody high-contrast black-and-emerald palette, dramatic rim lighting, wet surfaces, realistic fashion editorial photography, ultra-detailed textures, cyberpunk atmosphere, 1:1 square composition, no visible text, no watermark.
